title: Iridium Enchants
description: Providing a new and exciting aspect of PVP to your server via new enchantments and unique combat.
body:
<center>

PVP: **Remastered**

![](https://i.imgur.com/2IOty0N.png)

![](https://i.imgur.com/RowZIgQ.png)
[![https://iridium-development.gitbook.io/iridiumskyblock/](https://i.imgur.com/tyZEp5T.png)](https://iridium-development.gitbook.io/iridiumenchants/)

![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/github/license/Iridium-Development/IridiumEnchants?color=bc71f8)
![Modrinth Followers](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/followers/x1FoMQeW?style=flat&logo=modrinth&logoColor=1bd96a&color=1bd96a)
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/x1FoMQeW?style=flat&logo=modrinth&logoColor=1bd96a&color=1bd96a)
![Spiget tested server versions](https://img.shields.io/spiget/tested-versions/38733?color=bc71f8&style=flat)

---

</center>

Enchantments are a game-changer when it comes to combat, everyone knows that. Vanilla enchantments are powerful, and they certainly do improve PVP fights, but they're pretty basic.

What if we could change that?

Introducing IridiumEnchants, a customizable and user-friendly enchantments plugin that adds unique enchantments to your server. You no longer have to settle for the turtle shell if you want enhanced respiration, and hey, if you wanted your players to explode on hit, we can do that too.

IridiumEnchants, as with all of Iridium Development's software, aims to deliver a premium image, streamlining the setup process and eliminating the headache of having to figure out the details, while also proving to be extremely configurable to create an unparalleled experience.

---
**Features**

- An easy-to-use GUI, fully customizable and ready for players the moment you install the plugin.
- Customizable enchantments; from summoning lightning and decapitating your friends for a trophy to changing the landscape under your feet and any potion effect in the game. You can see our full list of enchantments on [our wiki](https://iridium-development.gitbook.io/iridiumenchants/enchantments/effects).
- An in-game enchantments shop, to sell these powerful spells to your players.
- Enchantment Table & Anvil support.

---
